_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: We found that the concentration of ADM in serum-free conditioned medium ranged from 0.152 to 1.072 ng/mL in MPNST cell lines. HGF in MPNST serum-free conditioned medium ranged from 0.426 to 25.01 ng/mL
details: Secreted ADM (0.152 to 1.072 ng/mL range) and HGF (0.426 to 25.01 ng/mL range) in serum-free conditioned medium
